calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Gary Fertig, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
Plaintiff's Witness: Linda Seals, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Aurelyn Moreno Castillo as follows:
Damages $29,832.18
Prejudgment Interest $1,838.47
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $377.50, for a total of $34.873.15
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Nov-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
